text: Hey, I moved date night to Friday instead of Saturday. Sitter confirmed for the 3rd.
Wait the 3rd is Friday right? That works. What about D&D though?
D&D is the 4th (Saturday). You're thinking of the old schedule.
Con, the doctor said to switch from Metoprolol to Diltiazem. 180mg extended release. Can you help me set up the new schedule?
Of course Ba. I will look into it. Is it replacing the Metoprolol 50mg completely?
Yes completely. Dr. Lam said the transition is immediate. I picked up the new prescription already.
Session 14 on the 4th - I am hosting. Can you bring the battle map? Also I need your character level-up choices before then.
Got it. I will prep Thalia tonight. Should be level 8 now right?
Might be 15-20 min late to D&D on the 4th. Deposition running long that week.
Tee time confirmed 7:30am Saturday at Prestonwood. Weather looks decent.
Angela, can I take Mai to dance rehearsal on Sunday the 5th? What time does it start?
That would be amazing Ma. I think it is 10am but I need to double check. I will confirm.
Hey Angela, quick heads up. Chen rendering pipeline is about 2 weeks behind the Nov 15 milestone. We might need to talk resource allocation.
Thanks Jenny. That is a code-freeze risk. Let me think about options and we can discuss Monday.
Tillman wants the RSU vest confirmation, 529 receipts, and the charitable donation receipt for the tax package.
Also your Ba mentioned Karen called about something with the clinic but I did not catch what it was about.
Can you check if the Minh soccer schedule changed? I thought it was Tuesdays but now I am seeing Wednesday on the calendar.
Oh and Angela, I refilled your Sumatriptan yesterday. You had 3 left from the last fill right? Or was it 4?
Soccer moved to Wednesdays starting this month. Coach Rodriguez sent an email last week.
Amanda Park called. She said something about a referral for a new patient but wanted to talk to you directly.
